summary: International user ESPN Sunday Night Baseball - Feed Select modal
description:
GIVEN a subscriber is located outside the United States
AND the subscriber is entitled for live game playback
AND an ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game is on the schedule

steps.action: WHEN a user selects any scheduled/in-progress ESPN Sunday Night Baseball game tile
steps.result:
THEN the feed select modal displays
AND video feed buttons are not displayed
AND a blackout messaging is displayed in the Feed Select modal
